spec.name: Soul Amplify Cone

spec.effect_description: Boosts soul flux as a fan spread at self reach, targeting one individual with sustained channeling by creating a fresh flux expression. A circle amplify/create recipe that channels soul discipline into soul output. It applies a cone pattern against individual across self reach with sustained persistence. The sustained window is set to 50 minutes.
